hero.headline: 20 sources. 5 minutes. Only what matters.
hero.subheadline: Newsroom AI picks the most important content from your sources, distills it to the essence, and reads it to you like a podcast. Hours of scrolling → minutes of listening.

problem.headline: 80% of professionals feel overwhelmed by information.

items.title: Too many sources
items.description: Dozens of blogs, newsletters, and portals. It's impossible to read it all.

items.title: Information noise
items.description: 90% of content is recycled or clickbait. Valuable articles drown in the noise.

items.title: No time
items.description: You scroll for hours instead of focusing on what truly matters.

items.title: AI extracts the essence
items.description: Every article summarized into a 2-sentence intro and full summary with key insights.

items.title: Listen instead of read
items.description: Text-to-Speech reads summaries like a podcast. On the go, on a walk, over coffee.

items.title: Your sources, zero noise
items.description: You choose what to follow. No algorithms, no ads, no clickbait.

items.title: Open Source, your rules
items.description: AGPL-3.0, self-hosted, BYO keys. Full control over your data and costs.

steps.title: Choose your sources
steps.description: Add blogs, portals, and newsletters you want to follow.

steps.title: AI distills the essence
steps.description: The algorithm extracts the most important information from each article.

steps.title: Listen or read
steps.description: Browse summaries or turn on TTS and listen like a podcast.

oss.headline: Free. Open. Under your control.
bullets: BYO keys — choose your own AI and TTS provider
Self-hosted — your data stays with you
Zero vendor lock-in — switch providers anytime

premium.headline: Coming soon: Newsroom AI
premium.subheadline: Zero configuration, full automation. Leave your email — we'll notify you at launch.
features: Voice briefing — podcast from your sources
premium.success: Thank you! We'll notify you at launch.
premium.alreadySignedUp: You're already on the list! We'll notify you at launch.
premium.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ for people overwhelmed by information
